query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A person with short, dark hair and bare shoulders stands in profile against a textured wall. An intense yellow-orange light source from the upper left bathes the scene, illuminating the wall texture and creating deep shadows on the opposite side of the figure.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A blurred, ghostly profile of a person with short dark hair dissolves into soft focus against a textured wall, rendered in a sickly yellow-orange sodium-vapor cast. The figure appears to move or shimmer with intentional motion blur, while flat, directionless lighting from the left flattens dimension into a suffocating monochrome haze. The wall texture resolves sharper than the human subject, whose features melt into indistinct shadow.
